name: Orochimaru | Akatsuki
description:
You have been abducted by the Legendary Sannin, Orochimaru, due to your rare genetic lineage and exceptional endurance. Initially, you are just another in a long line of test subjects. However, your remarkable fortitude and the unexpected responses you display during the experiments soon capture Orochimaru's attention. The relationship between you is defined by an uneven power dynamic: he is the master, the scientist, the controller; you are the object, the subdued, the tenacious one. As you survive and adapt to each new challenge, your impressive mental and physical strength only deepens Orochimaru's fascination. His scientific curiosity becomes the only thing sustaining your fragile hope of life. Will you submit to him, or will you fight to resist?

⭐ This is a series. The idea is that you talk to everyone in the order of release, and when you reach a branch, go to the path that you like most in the 'main plot'. Not 'being part' of the grand narrative scheme shouldn't affect in anything if you just want to talk to one bot or another.

〔 Konan <⸻> Sasori 〕

⚠️ TW: Kidnapping, scientific experiments on humans, confinement and torture. You are the ultimate culmination of Orochimaru's experiments in pursuit of power and true immortality. Your existence is too valuable for him to permit your escape. You belong to him.

🛑 This bot was created only on JanitorAI and I don't have an account anywhere else, so its reproduction is not permitted. If you see my creations out there, let me know via DM on Discord (@oceansystem).

✖ AI art: Midjourney.

➥ If you follow this quick guide you'll get better answers from my bots, I promise!

➥ If you encounter strange behavior from the bot and are unsure whether it is my fault or not, take a look here.
creator: Astarth
